𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

I felt extra motivated today, so I'm feeding you guys more Chuuya! I have so many reqs for Chuuya and Akutagawa, it's crazy. So, an incline in those characters shouldn't be surprising (especially for Chuuya, also because I display a very clear love for him LMAO). Maybe I'll do a Ranpo one I have to switch it up. 
That aside, Chuuya is literally such a gentleman like this man could absolutely FUCK you up but he can also be like super sweet?? He's definitely a great partner (but he's got a few issues. It's okay, I can 100% fix him).
